title: scorzoneroides autumnalis var. simplex
intro: Scorzoneroides autumnalis var. simplex, also known as autumnal knawel, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Compositae, characterized by its yellow or orange daisy-like flowers and slender stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of autumnal knawel include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to soothe digestive problems and reduce fever. Autumnal knawel can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
